items.title: Katherine flooding nears peak as 'major flood' risk to remain until Sunday

items.title: Melissa Lucashenko shares about genesis of new book Not Quite White in the Head

But when it became clear to the Miles Franklin Literary Award winner that a self-professed fan had only read her non-fiction work, she decided it was time to put together a collection of essays called Not Quite White in the Head.
